data.title: Belararox Ltd Revises Materiality of TMT Project Results, Initiates Trading Halt
data.description:
Belararox Ltd. ( (AU:BRX) ) just unveiled an update.

Belararox Ltd, in response to an ASX Aware Letter, clarified that the initial assay results from their TMT Project were not deemed material due to the copper grade being below expectations and outside the target drilling zone. However, subsequent discussions and ongoing drilling results led the company to reconsider the materiality of the visual estimates from a second drill hole, prompting a trading halt to announce these findings. This decision reflects the company’s adherence to ASX compliance requirements and its commitment to transparent reporting.

More about Belararox Ltd.

YTD Price Performance: 72.22%

Average Trading Volume: 698,172

data.title: Coles Group Announces Director’s Shareholding Change
data.description:
Coles Group Ltd. ( (AU:COL) ) just unveiled an update.

Coles Group Limited has announced a change in the director’s interest, specifically involving Jacqueline Chow, who disposed of 3,000 fully paid ordinary shares at an average price of $19.23 per share. This change reflects a reduction in her holdings from 20,000 to 17,000 shares, which may have implications for investor perceptions and the company’s governance dynamics.

More about Coles Group Ltd.

Coles Group Limited is a prominent Australian retailer operating in the supermarket, liquor, and convenience sectors. The company is known for providing a wide range of grocery products and services, focusing on delivering value and quality to its customers across Australia.

data.title: Star Asia Expands Osaka Property Portfolio with Retail Acquisition
data.description:
Star Asia Investment Corp. ( (JP:3468) ) has shared an update.

Star Asia Investment Corporation has announced the additional acquisition of a retail property, ‘abeno nini (Retail),’ in Osaka. This acquisition is expected to enhance the liquidity and asset value of the property, contributing to stable income in the medium to long term. Despite a lower NOI yield compared to the company’s total portfolio, the acquisition is strategically beneficial due to its location and the use of cash on hand for financing.

More about Star Asia Investment Corp.

Star Asia Investment Corporation operates as a Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) focusing on acquiring and managing real estate properties. The company is involved in the retail, hotel, and residential sectors, with a particular emphasis on properties in strategic locations such as Osaka, Japan.

data.description:
Highfield Resources Limited ( (AU:HFR) ) has shared an announcement.

Highfield Resources Limited has released its Corporate Governance Statement for 2025, emphasizing its commitment to strong governance practices in line with the Australian Securities Exchange’s principles. The statement outlines the roles and responsibilities of the board and management, highlighting the establishment of committees to support governance functions and ensure effective management processes. This approach is designed to enhance shareholder interests and align the company’s operations with its strategic objectives.

data.title: Air New Zealand Enhances Shareholder Value with Share Buy-Back
data.description:
Air New Zealand Limited ( (ANZFF) ) has provided an announcement.

Air New Zealand Limited has announced the acquisition of 306,097 ordinary shares as part of its share buy-back program. This initiative, which includes both on-market and off-market acquisitions, aims to enhance shareholder value and optimize the company’s capital structure. The shares acquired will be canceled, reducing the total number of shares outstanding and potentially increasing the value of remaining shares. This strategic move reflects the company’s commitment to efficient capital management and may positively impact its market positioning.

More about Air New Zealand Limited

Air New Zealand Limited operates in the aviation industry, providing air travel services primarily within New Zealand and internationally. The company is a key player in the airline market, focusing on passenger and cargo transport.

data.title: ZIMI Ltd Proposes Strategic Resolutions to Strengthen Financial and Governance Framework
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from ZIMI Ltd ( (AU:ZMM) ).

ZIMI Ltd’s Board is advocating for five resolutions to bolster the company’s financial standing and governance. These include converting debt into equity, ratifying past sales, and approving future transactions with related parties, ensuring compliance with ASX rules. An Independent Expert’s Report supports these resolutions as fair and reasonable, aiming to enhance shareholder value and operational transparency.

More about ZIMI Ltd

ZIMI Ltd operates in the technology sector, focusing on the development and distribution of smart home and electrical products. The company aims to expand its market reach through strategic partnerships and distribution agreements.

data.title: ispace Recognized for Best Practices in Business Disclosure
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from ispace,inc. ( (JP:9348) ).

ispace, inc. has been recognized by the Japanese Financial Services Agency for exemplary business practices in its annual securities report, highlighting its proactive information disclosure and unique management environment. This recognition underscores ispace’s commitment to transparency and investor relations, as it continues to advance its lunar missions, including the SMBC x HAKUTO-R Venture Moon Mission 2, with future missions planned to further its role in lunar exploration.

More about ispace,inc.

ispace is a global lunar exploration company that specializes in designing and building lunar landers and rovers. With a vision to expand human life into space, ispace aims to provide high-frequency, low-cost transportation services to the Moon. The company operates in Japan, Luxembourg, and the United States, employing approximately 300 people worldwide.

data.title: Emperador Inc. Schedules Virtual Annual Stockholders’ Meeting for May 2025
data.description:
Emperador Inc. ( (SG:EMI) ) just unveiled an update.

Emperador Inc. has announced that its Annual Stockholders’ Meeting will be held virtually on May 19, 2025. The meeting will cover key agenda items including the approval of previous meeting minutes, management’s report for 2024, appointment of independent auditors, ratification of board actions, and the election of directors. Stockholders of record as of April 15, 2025, are entitled to participate and vote in the meeting. This announcement underscores Emperador’s commitment to maintaining transparency and engaging with its stakeholders in corporate governance matters.

More about Emperador Inc.

Emperador Inc. is a company based in the Philippines, primarily involved in the production and distribution of alcoholic beverages. The company focuses on the global market, leveraging its strong brand presence and diverse product offerings to maintain its competitive edge.
